zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Gilbert Bonde於1385年出生在英國可瓦爾瑞時，他的父親Richard Bonde III61歲，母親Mrs. Richard Bonde26歲。他於大約1405年與Lady Elizabeth de Earth在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1431年在英國斯塔福爾希爾頓享年47歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Gilbert Bonde于1385年出生在英国可瓦爾瑞时，他的父亲Richard Bonde III61岁，母亲Mrs. Richard Bonde26岁。他于大约1405年与Lady Elizabeth de Earth在英国可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1431年在英国斯塔福爾希爾頓享年47岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Bonde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Anders, Erik.
Danish and Swedish: status name for a farmer, from Old Norse bóndi ‘farmer’ (see also Bond ).

variants.name: Bondeson
meanings: Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Bondesson: patronymic from the personal name Bonde . In some cases this is also an Americanized form of the very rare Norwegian cognate Bondesen. Compare Bunderson .

variants.name: Bond
meanings: English: status name for a peasant farmer or husbandman, Middle English bond(e), bounde, occasionally bande ‘bondman, customary tenant, serf’ (Old English bonda, bunda, reinforced by Old Norse bóndi). The Old Norse word was also in use as a personal name (Old Norse Bóndi, Bondi, Bundi, Bonde, borrowed as late Old English Bonda), and this has given rise to other English and Scandinavian surnames alongside those originating as status names, such as the Middle English personal name Bonde. The status of the peasant farmer fluctuated considerably during the Middle Ages; moreover, the underlying ancient Germanic word is of disputed origin and meaning. Among ancient Germanic peoples who settled to an agricultural life, the term came to signify a farmer holding lands from, and bound by loyalty to, a lord; from this developed the sense of a free landholder as opposed to a serf. In England after the Norman Conquest the word sank in status and became associated with the notion of bound servitude. The name can also be a variant of Band .
In some cases also an American shortened form of Ukrainian Bondarenko and possibly also of some other surname beginning with Bond-.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Gilbert Bonde was born in 1385, in Penryn, Cornwall, England, his father, Richard Bonde III, was 61 and his mother, Mrs. Richard Bonde, was 26. He married Lady Elizabeth de Earth about 1405, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1431, in Hilton, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Gilbert Bonde est né en 1385, à Penryn, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Richard Bonde III, avait 61 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Richard Bonde, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth d’Earth environ 1405, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1431, à Hilton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Gilbert Bonde 1385 in Penryn, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Bonde III 61 und seine Mutter Mrs. Richard Bonde 26. Er hat um 1405 in Cornwall, England Lady Elizabeth de Earth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1431 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Hilton, Staffordshire, England und wurde in Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Gilbert Bonde è nato il nel 1385 nel Penryn, Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Richard Bonde III, aveva 61 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Richard Bonde, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth de Earth circa 1405, nel Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1431, nel Hilton, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Gilbert Bondeが1385年にイギリスコルンワルペンリンで生まれた時，父Richard Bonde IIIは61歳，母Mrs. Richard Bondeは26歳であった。約1405年にイギリスコルンワルでLady Elizabeth de Earthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1431年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアヒルトンで47歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Gilbert Bonde(이)가 1385년 영국 코른월 펜린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Bonde III(은)는 61세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Richard Bonde(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1405년 영국 코른월에서 Lady Elizabeth de Earth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1431년 영국 스태퍼드실르 힐턴에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Gilbert Bonde nasceu em 1385, em Penryn, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Bonde III, tinha 61 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Richard Bonde, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth de Earth aproximadamente 1405, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1431, em Hilton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Gilbert Bonde родился в 1385 г. в местности пенрин, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Bonde III было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Richard Bonde, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth de Earth около 1405 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1431 г. в местности хилтон, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Gilbert Bonde nació en 1385, en Penryn, Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Bonde III, tenía 61 años y su mamá, Mrs. Richard Bonde, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth de Earth aproximadamente 1405, en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1431, en Hilton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
